experience.text:
Mobile App Developer   ·   Veloxity Tech Pvt. Ltd.

Feb 2023 – Present   •   Remote

Led mobile development for a consumer super-app (React Native) with 800K+ downloads on iOS and Android — handling ride booking, food delivery, and digital payments in one interface.

Architected a modular monorepo structure (Nx) with shared design tokens and component libraries, enabling a 3-person mobile team to ship features 40% faster.

Implemented deep-linking, push notifications (FCM + APNs), and background location tracking using native modules, increasing D7 retention by 19%.

Reduced app cold start time from 3.2s to 1.

React Native Developer | Appwave Studios | Jul 2021 – Jan 2023
- 1s by migrating to Hermes engine, lazy-loading heavy screens, and eliminating blocking JS thread operations.
- Set up Fastlane pipelines for automated code signing, version bumping, and simultaneous App Store + Play Store releases — cutting release overhead from 1 day to 20 minutes.
- Integrated Sentry for real-time crash reporting and session replays, achieving 99.7% crash-free rate across 50K+ daily active sessions.
- Developed and shipped 5 client apps across fintech, edtech, and health verticals — all rated 4.4+ stars on the App Store and Play Store.
- Built a real-time chat and video consultation feature for a telemedicine app using WebSockets + Twilio Video SDK, enabling 10,000+ monthly doctor-patient sessions.
- Integrated Razorpay and Stripe in-app payment flows (one-time, subscription, UPI) with PCI-DSS compliant token handling across 3 apps.
